title: Nilpotent group codes
author_string: Duarte, A., Pereira, A., Polcino Milies, C.
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: In this paper, we consider essential idempotents in the finite semisimple group algebra of a nilpotent group, studying conditions for their existence and other implications. Also, we discuss conditions for nilpotent group codes to be equivalent to Abelian ones.
